since_last: 84% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.08%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 84% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.38% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 84% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.08%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.08%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at +5.24%
cards.body: Leaders: EQIX +5.24%, AMAT +4.58%, AVAV +3.83%, LRCX +3.67%, KLAC +3.26%. Laggards: CRNC -1.23%, PUBM -0.88%, CRM -0.59%, CRWD -0.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.32% at $155.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
